```rust
static SIG_ALRM: AtomicBool = AtomicBool::new(false);
static SIG_TERM: AtomicI32 = AtomicI32::new(0);
```

For the signal handler:
```rust
extern "C" fn sig_handler(signo: c_int) {
    if signo == KILLSIG.load(Ordering::Relaxed) {
        SIG_TERM.store(signo, Ordering::Relaxed);
        return;
    }
    match signo {
        libc::SIGCHLD => SIG_CHLD.store(true, Ordering::Relaxed),
        libc::SIGALRM => SIG_ALRM.store(true, Ordering::Relaxed),
        // terminating signals...
        libc::SIGHUP | libc::SIGINT | ... => SIG_TERM.store(signo, Ordering::Relaxed),
        _ => SIG_OTHER.store(signo, Ordering::Relaxed),
    }
}
```

```rust
static SIG_CHLD: AtomicBool = AtomicBool::new(false);
static SIG_ALRM: AtomicBool = AtomicBool::new(false);
static SIG_TERM: AtomicI32 = AtomicI32::new(0);
static SIG_OTHER: AtomicI32 = AtomicI32::new(0);
static KILLSIG: AtomicI32 = AtomicI32::new(libc::SIGTERM);
static VERBOSE: AtomicBool = AtomicBool::new(false);
static COMMAND: AtomicPtr<c_char> = AtomicPtr::new(ptr::null_mut());

extern "C" fn sig_handler(signo: libc::c_int) {
    if signo == KILLSIG.load(Ordering::Relaxed) {
        SIG_TERM.store(signo, Ordering::Relaxed);
        return;
    }
    // ... switch on signo
}
```
